top_signals.title: Rubio to Meet India’s Modi With Energy, Trade Ties in Focus
top_signals.summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio will meet Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Saturday, with energy security high on the agenda as the South Asian nation grapples with soaring oil prices and supply disruptions stemming from the war in Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India Raises Diesel, Gasoline Prices for Third Time in Eight Days
top_signals.summary: India’s state-run refiners raised retail prices again of diesel and gasoline on Saturday to help processors cut losses on discounted sales and to control a spike in demand.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: F2Pool founder who controls 11% of bitcoin's hashrate to lead first SpaceX mission to Mars
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
